case_title: GIL JA KIM VS. PRESTON D. CHEEK JR.

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY KIM, GIL JA AS TO DEFENDANT CHEEK JR., PRESTON D. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-14-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-09-2011 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO FEB-15-2012 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506, PER JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL.
TRIAL RESET TO DEC-09-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF OCT-14-2011 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CHEEK JR., PRESTON D.
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE & REQUEST FOR RESET OF COURT DATE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF KIM, GIL JA
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF KIM, GIL JA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-15-2012 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $42.00) SERVED OCT-25-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHEEK JR., PRESTON D.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KIM, GIL JA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHEEK JR., PRESTON D. $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $127.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,627.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE IS "GRANTED", PER JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-15-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-15-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO ON 05/29/2024 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
